import React from 'react'; import Header from './Header'; const RFIDIntegration = () => { const userInfo = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('userInfo')); return (

RFID Integration Guide

Overview

This guide provides detailed information about integrating RFID functionality into your applications using our API endpoints.

Authentication

All API requests require authentication using a JWT token. The token can be obtained through the login endpoint.

Authorization: Bearer your-jwt-token

API Endpoints

{/* Save RFID Transaction Details */}

1. Save RFID Transaction Details

Endpoint: /api/ProductMaster/SaveRFIDTransactionDetails

Save new RFID transaction details to the inventory stock table. 

{JSON.stringify({
                          "ClientCode": "LS0001235",
                          "RFIDNumber": "RFID123456789",
                          "ItemCode": "ITEM001",
                          "CategoryId": 1,
                          "ProductId": 2,
                          "DesignId": 3,
                          "PurityId": 4,
                          "GrossWeight": "10.50",
                          "NetWeight": "9.80",
                          "BoxNumber": "BOX001",
                          "Status": "ApiActive"
                        }, null, 2)}
{/* Update RFID Transaction Details */}

2. Update RFID Transaction Details

Endpoint: /api/ProductMaster/UpdateRFIDTransactionDetails

Update the status of the product to Active or Sold based on the RFID Number. 

{JSON.stringify({
                          "ClientCode": "LS0001235",
                          "RFIDNumber": "RFID123456789",
                          "Status": "Sold"
                        }, null, 2)}
{/* Get RFID Transaction Details */}

3. Get RFID Transaction Details

Endpoint: /api/ProductMaster/GetRFIDTransactionDetails

Retrieve all records from the inventory stock table. 

{JSON.stringify({
                          "ClientCode": "LS0001235"
                        }, null, 2)}
{/* Delete Labelled Stock Items */}

4. Delete Labelled Stock Items

Endpoint: /api/ProductMaster/DeleteLabelledStockItems

Delete one or more items using ClientCode, RFID Number, or ItemCode. 

{JSON.stringify({
                          "ClientCode": "LS0001235",
                          "RFIDNumbers": ["RFID123456789", "RFID987654321"],
                          "ItemCodes": ["ITEM001", "ITEM002"]
                        }, null, 2)}

Error Handling

The API uses standard HTTP response codes. Errors will return a JSON object with a message field explaining the error. 

{JSON.stringify({
                        "Status": false,
                        "Message": "Error description here"
                      }, null, 2)}
); }; export default RFIDIntegration;
